automatedGates.oneWidgetPerFile: verified — all 3 new widget files compliant
automatedGates.noWidgetReturningMethods: verified — all UI in build() only
automatedGates.hardRules: no commits made, no protected files touched

manualProbesRequired: AC-1/AC-2: SOAT creation happy path — verify SoatConfirmationPage opens and SOAT badge appears in garage
AC-3: Create vehicle without SOAT — verify direct pop, no SOAT page
AC-4: Airplane mode on SoatConfirmationPage — verify vehicle preserved without SOAT
Regression: Edit existing vehicle — verify no SOAT redirect, badge unchanged
AC-5: Registration with allowedBrands=['*'] — verify vehicle selector shows vehicles
AC-7: Registration with zero vehicles — verify empty state + CTA

openRisks.description: SoatConfirmationPage.success calls Navigator.pop() + router.pop(). Second pop may over-pop GoRouter stack when page entered via Navigator.pushReplacement.
openRisks.remediation: If AC-1 probe lands on blank/wrong screen: remove router.pop() from SoatConfirmationPage success handler or add a navigatedViaReplacement source flag.

openRisks.description: No context.mounted guard before Navigator.pushReplacement in BlocListener. Near-zero risk but inconsistent with project convention.
openRisks.remediation: Add if (!context.mounted) return; before the Navigator call as a follow-up.

recommendedCommitMessage:
fix(vehicles,registration): persist SOAT after vehicle creation and fix vehicle selector loading state

- Fix #17: VehicleFormPage._formListener now redirects to SoatConfirmationPage
  (via Navigator.pushReplacement) when a new vehicle is created with a pending
  soatLocalPath, reusing the existing SOAT upload + confirmation flow so
  dates/insurer are captured before persisting.
- Fix #21: RegistrationFormContent BlocBuilder now uses state.when() snapshot
  instead of context.read().availableVehicles, correctly showing a spinner
  (initial/loading), vehicle selector (data with vehicles), or empty CTA
  (data empty / empty / error).
- Extract VehicleSelectorLoading, VehicleSelectorEmpty, VehicleSelectorField
  widgets per rideglory one-widget-per-file coding standard.
- Add 11 new tests: 3 VehicleSelectorLoading, 3 VehicleSelectorEmpty,
  5 VehicleFormCubit soatLocalPath unit tests. Total: 119/119 passing.
- dart analyze: 0 new issues in changed/new files.

Closes #17, #21
